Am Dienstag, 30. November 2010 19:30:23 schrieb Edwin Groothuis:
> Maintainer of java/springframework,
>=20
> Please note that PR ports/152712 has just been submitted.
>=20
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>=20
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/152712
>=20
Great work, please commit it!

Best regards
